message:
Update overscan on resize, setSequence, and zoom changes

Ensure dynamic overscan is properly recalculated whenever viewport
dimensions change:

- resize(): Call updateOverscanTargets + applyOverscan after viewport
  size update
- setSequence(): Same, in case sequence length affects visible rows
- setZoomScale(): Same, since cell height changes affect rows per view

This ensures the overscan row counts stay appropriate when any
dimension affecting visible row count changes, not just during
initial construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
